project_name: Activation of transposable elements as a trigger of neuroinflammation in Parkinson's disease
project_description: Transposable elements (TE) have been linked to inflammatory states, but their potential role in PD has not been explored. Using deep bulk RNAseq of postmortem brain tissue from four brain regions, we studied TE transcriptional activation and its correlation with neuroinflammation in PD.
dataset_title: Deep bulk RNAseq of neurological controls and PD brains
dataset_description: Deep bulk RNA sequencing of brain regions from healthy and Parkinson's Disease individuals
contributor_names: Raquel Garza, Anita Adami, Arun Thiruvalluvan, Sasvi Wijesinghe, Annabel Curle, Oliver Tam, Talitha Forcier, Danai A Lagka, Nina L Kazakou, Diahann A.M Atacho, Yogita Sharma, Jo Jones, Annelies Quaegebeur, Molly Hammell, Agnete Kirkeby, Roger A. Barker, Johan Jakobsson
